items.title: Ornith-1.0
items.description:
• Writes its own coding harness
• Open‑source, MIT‑licensed models
• State‑of‑the‑art results up to 397B

items.title: Chaser‑Claude Slack
items.description:
• AI can assign tasks in Slack
• Integrates with Claude via MCP
• Tracks and auto‑reminds on work

items.title: SeniorSafe
items.description:
• Stops real‑time phone fraud
• Blocks AI‑deepfake scam calls
• Protects seniors without user effort

items.title: MiMo-V2 Omni
items.description:
• Sees, hears, and acts in real time
• Handles long audio and video streams
• Runs browser and office tasks via API

items.title: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit
items.description:
• Builds secure, specialized AI agents
• Offers sandboxed runtime with RBAC
• Integrates Llama 3.1, Nemotron‑4, NIM

items.title: Un-0 Image Generator
items.description:
• Creates images using coupled oscillators
• Matches early GAN quality on ImageNet 64×64
• Open weights for research and experimentation
